overview.description: The iShares iBonds 2031 Term High Yield and Income ETF (IBHK) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in high yield fixed income. The fund tracks a market-value-weighted index of USD-denominated, high yield and BBB-rated corporate bonds maturing in 2031. The fund will terminate in December 2031 IBHK was launched on May 22, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: Bloomberg 2031 Term High Yield and Income Index
